import pandas as pd
import folium
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
from sqlalchemy import create_engine
In [5]:
engine = create_engine("postgresql://postgres:bingka@localhost:5432/hawkerdb")
In [6]:
df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
In [7]:
# Query hawker centres + closure data

query = """
SELECT 
    hc.name,
    hc.latitude AS lat,
    hc.longitude AS lon,
    hc.region,
    ce.closure_type,
    ce.start_date,
    ce.end_date,
    ce.remarks
FROM hawker_centres hc
LEFT JOIN closure_events ce
    ON hc.hawker_id = ce.hawker_id
ORDER BY hc.name, ce.start_date;
"""

df = pd.read_sql(query, engine)
df.head()

In [8]:
# Folium Map 

m = folium.Map(location=[1.3521, 103.8198], zoom_start=11)
In [9]:
# Markers with closure popups

for _, row in df.iterrows():
    popup_html = f"""
    <b>{row['name']}</b><br>
    <b>Region:</b> {row['region']}<br>
    <b>Closure Type:</b> {row['closure_type']}<br>
    <b>Start:</b> {row['start_date']}<br>
    <b>End:</b> {row['end_date']}<br>
    <b>Remarks:</b> {row['remarks']}
    """

    folium.Marker(
        location=[row["lat"], row["lon"]],
        popup=folium.Popup(popup_html, max_width=300),
        icon=folium.Icon(color="blue")
    ).add_to(m)

m
